title: Disenchant Anvil
description: Disenchant items and split books with an anvil drop, Obsidian or Crying Obsidian required as floor block.
body:
# 📖 DisenchantAnvil

**Minecraft Mod for NeoForge – 1.21.1**  
by **Holysweet**

***

## 🪄 What It Does

Disenchant items or enchanted books — because sometimes you want the enchant off that **potato**, or that **stick**, and put it where it belongs: **your gear**. 🙂

***

## 🎮 How to Use

1.  Place **Obsidian** or **Crying Obsidian**.
2.  Put items **directly on top** of that block:  
    *   **Plain Books** – 1 for every enchant you wish to move (2 if you are splitting a book).
    *   **Enchanted Items** – to strip.
    *   **Enchanted Books** – to split.
3.  Drop an **Anvil** so it **lands on the obsidian**.

**Behavior (short & sweet):**

*   **Items → Books:** Removes enchants (**curses first, then top-down**).  
    Each removed enchant **consumes 1 plain book** and creates **1 enchanted book**.
*   **Enchanted Books:** If it has **multiple enchants**, it’s **split** into single-enchant books (the original is removed). Single-enchant books are left alone.
*   **QoL:** Repair/“prior work” cost is cleared; drops are nudged outward.
*   **Batch-friendly:** Handles big piles in one thunk (server limits apply).

***

## 📋 Requirements

*   **Minecraft 1.21.1**
*   **NeoForge** (matching loader)

***

## 📦 Modpack Permissions

✅ Free to use in any public or private modpack.  
💬 Please credit **Holysweet** in your modlist/description.

***

_Big thanks to AquariusSidhe for testing the edge cases 💜_

***

## 💡 Future Plans

More tiny QoL and a bit of ✨magic✨ may follow.

Thanks for trying **DisenchantAnvil**! 🔨📚
